post.description: Returns access and refresh JWT tokens on success.
Submit the refresh token in the Authorization header to obtain a new access token.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of problems. Staff users can pass all=1 to include hidden problems.

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: Set to 1 to include hidden problems (staff only)

post.description: Upload a ZIP file containing problem definitions and testcases to bulk-import problems.

parameters.name: testdata
parameters.description: Set to "false" or "0" to exclude testdata

get.description: Returns problem metadata needed by the submission form, optionally scoped to a contest.
get.summary: Get submission context for a problem

get.description: Returns full problem detail including statement, tags, and metadata. Contest-scoped if contestId is provided.

post.description: Submit source code for judging. Returns the submission number for tracking via SSE.

get.description: Opens a Server-Sent Events stream that emits real-time updates as testcases are judged. The stream closes when judging completes.

post.summary: Verify contest password for private contests

200.description: List of judge nodes with heartbeat info

get.summary: List all judge nodes and their status

200.description: List of submissions matching the rejudge criteria

post.description: Rejudge all submissions matching the criteria. This is an async operation.

200.description: List of all contests including hidden

post.summary: Add or update a contest registration
Vote on a discussion or reply

patch.summary: Toggle pin on a discussion (admin only)
